headline: SanDisk Just Tried To Break The Memory Cycle
summary: Beyond the initial AI-fueled surge, it is how management leveraged that momentum that has Wall Street taking notice.

headline: 2 Reasons to Like NTAP (and 1 Not So Much)
summary: NetApp has been on fire lately. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has rocketed 52.6%, reaching $177.00 per share. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the run-up might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: Cisco’s AI Platforms And Cybersecurity Push Test Valuation For Investors
summary: Cisco Systems (NasdaqGS:CSCO) has rolled out Cloud Control, an AI-centric platform that ties together networking, observability, and security. The company has expanded its Live Protect automated cybersecurity offering and introduced a quantum-safe security framework. Cisco has deepened its alliance with NetApp, launching joint solutions for secure AI infrastructure and ransomware resilience. These product launches and partnerships were highlighted around the Cisco Live event and come after...

headline: HPE’s AI Orders Double With One Major Catch
summary: When Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) reported its Q2 results, (Oct. year), it delivered a report card so strong that it fundamentally reset market expectations. Driving that shift was a massive pivot in guidance: management announced it now expects to generate “at least $3.5 billion” in free cash flow this year. Those are the same milestones the company had originally targeted for the long term, now pulled forward a full two years.

headline: The 5 Most Interesting Analyst Questions From NetApp’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: NetApp’s first quarter results saw a marked positive response from the market, as revenue and non-GAAP earnings per share both exceeded Wall Street expectations. Management attributed the robust top-line growth to strong enterprise demand for AI-enabled data infrastructure and continued momentum in both public cloud and all-flash storage solutions. CEO George Kurian emphasized that NetApp’s ability to support real-time, secure, and hybrid data activation for AI workloads helped the company win s
